messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document. Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text. Section metadata: { "node_id": "0085", "title": "新品占据收入榜单超半数历史罕见 单一品类爆发提前释放了玩家需求", "page_index": 26, "page_range": "26-1" } Section text: ## 新品占据收入榜单超半数历史罕见 单一品类爆发提前释放了玩家需求 韩国移动游戏收入榜呈现出一个历史罕见的现象：TOP10产品中超半数席位被新品占据，并且新品几乎清一色是MMORPG品类，同时多为韩国经典端游IP的改编或重启之作。同一公司在一年内“祭出”多款同赛道下的重磅产品自我竞争，显然背后有不可撼动的力量在推动；但辩证的来看，新品能历史罕见的“清洗”收入榜单，也说明韩国移动游戏市场仍充满了生命力与竞争力，来自中国游戏厂商乐牛游戏的《I9》跻身TOP10就是最好的印证之一。另一方面值得注意的是，对比往年榜单中放置、休闲、体育等多品类开花的局面，2025年的韩国手游市场产品结构显著收缩。点点数据认为这种围绕MMORPG的结构收缩更像是一种过度消耗，其他细分品类或在未来两年反而有机会释放出更大市场潜力。 2025年韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜
排名icon游戏名厂商全年流水（亿元）同比增长率
1M天堂MNCSOFT44.82-20.72%
2无尽冬日点点互动24.7472.62%
3X2Last War:SurvivalFirst Fun23.62-29.98%
4DIN奥丁：神判Kakao Games13.79-32.45%
5Rabbit洛奇MNEXON13.052025年新品
6Vnetmable吸血鬼网石游戏12.102025年新品
7netmable七骑士 Re:BIRTH网石游戏11.332025年新品
8RF netmableRF ONLINE NEXT网石游戏10.452025年新品
9枫之谷：放置冒险记NEXON8.412025年新品
10I9乐牛游戏8.152025年新品
2025年韩国移动游戏收入新品TOP榜

message.content:
This section answers retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics:** 2025 South Korean mobile game market revenue trends, new release dominance, MMORPG genre saturation, market structural contraction, and future sub-genre potential.
- **Entities:** Top-grossing titles (天堂M, 无尽冬日, Last War:Survival, 奥丁：神判, 洛奇M, 吸血鬼, 七骑士 Re:BIRTH, RF ONLINE NEXT, 枫之谷：放置冒险记, I9, 奔奔王国, 尤弥尔传奇, 不休旅途:绘卷世界, 缔造者:放逐之地), publishers/developers (NCSOFT, 点点互动, First Fun, Kakao Games, NEXON, 网石游戏, 乐牛游戏, 娱美德, 4399, DRIMAGE), and data provider (点点数据).
- **Dates:** 2025 (reporting year), specific 2025 launch months for top new games (January, February, March, April, May, August, October), and a forward-looking market prediction window (next two years).
- **Claims & Insights:** Over 50% of the 2025 TOP 10 revenue chart consists of new releases, a historically rare occurrence. New releases are predominantly MMORPGs, largely adaptations or reboots of classic Korean PC IPs. The market demonstrates strong vitality and competitiveness, evidenced by Chinese title I9 entering the TOP 10. The 2025 market structure has significantly contracted around MMORPGs compared to past multi-genre diversity, which may indicate overconsumption; other sub-genres are predicted to unlock greater market potential within the next two years.
- **Tables & Metrics:** Contains two ranked data tables: (1) 2025 Overall Mobile Game Revenue TOP 10 (columns: rank, game, publisher, annual revenue in 亿元, YoY growth rate); (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10 (columns: rank, game, publisher, annual revenue in 亿元, overall chart rank, launch date). Key metrics include exact annual revenue figures (e.g., 44.82亿元 for #1) and YoY performance changes (ranging from -32.45% to +72.62%, with new releases marked as "2025年新品").
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative revenue rankings, year-over-year growth/decline metrics, launch timeline tracking, comparative historical market analysis (2025 vs. prior years), and data-driven industry forecasting.
